title: Null user list crashes dashboard
description: Dashboard crashes on first load when API returns null instead of an empty array.

error_signature.message: TypeError: Cannot read property 'map' of undefined

root_cause.description: API returned null for users field; component assumed an array.

fix_pattern.description: Guard with optional chaining and default to empty array

pr.title: fix: null-safe user list in Dashboard

title: CORS blocked on login API
description: Frontend login fails in staging because the API does not allow the staging origin.

error_signature.message: Access to fetch at 'https://api.staging.example.com/login' from origin 'https://app.staging.example.com' has been blocked by CORS policy

root_cause.description: Staging frontend origin was missing from API CORS allowlist.

fix_pattern.description: Add staging origin to CORS middleware allow_origins

pr.title: fix: add staging origin to CORS

title: Unhandled promise rejection in profile fetch
description: Profile page shows blank state when fetch rejects; error swallowed by missing await.

error_signature.message: Unhandled promise rejection: TypeError: Cannot read properties of undefined (reading 'avatar')

root_cause.description: Missing try/catch around async fetch; component rendered before data arrived.

fix_pattern.description: Await fetch inside try/catch and guard render until profile loads
fix_pattern.code_snippet: try { const profile = await fetchProfile(id); setProfile(profile); } catch (e) { setError(e); }

title: Missing env var breaks database connection
description: Local dev fails silently when NEO4J_URI is unset; connection returns None.

error_signature.message: neo4j.exceptions.ServiceUnavailable: Could not connect to neo4j://localhost:7687

root_cause.description: Developer copied repo without .env; default URI pointed to localhost.

fix_pattern.description: Copy .env.example to .env and set AuraDB credentials

pr.title: docs: clarify .env setup for Neo4j Aura
